textByHash.e8c07de762b263b8aaaab35de3b645373e9449b8: Hey it's the Hero! Wow! You're amazing, how on earth did you manage to tackle those two juvinates and Gadderanks? And the town is lovely, you've done a great job!
textByHash.925aec4b6c0ef1348aeee0496b4d4e98e9fba46b: Not that it makes much difference but my name's Sergiu. Like all the other survivors here, I just try to make do and get through each day at a time.
textByHash.e60b9b7a076ef98c181f3236654c3cafa131c312: It's just perfect, thanks so much for your efforts.
textByHash.39f006d0b329bd1c0331657fa80a2ddad292768b: Oh, not much really, we're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place, hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey to the temple on the Salve.
textByHash.213261ea8d9ff9ff4438d8ff6c17a3514b73ab91: Not as far as I know, we have some basic amenities now which is so very useful, we're all incredibly grateful to you.
textByHash.4d2852af509ec15507de46a99df7fc0f3f5fc904: I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
